subject: Applied AI Engineer Role
body: Hi Shivam, thanks for applying. We liked your backend and AI project experience. Are you available this week for a quick intro call?

subject: Junior Engineer Opening
body: Hi Shivam, we are hiring junior engineers. The role involves Java, Angular, SQL, Docker, and web services.

subject: Healthcare AI Backend Discussion
body: The role is backend-heavy and involves building APIs for healthcare workflows, integrating LLM features, and working with patient-document automation.

subject: Founding Engineer Role
body: Hi Shivam, I came across your profile and wanted to discuss a founding engineer role at our startup.

subject: Fintech Backend Engineer Role
body: Hi Shivam, we are hiring for a fintech backend engineer role focused on payments, Java, Kafka, and distributed systems.
